{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230321113A2AC000FA1B04FCA81D"}"},"total":1700},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7609623136222970649","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错吧，是爽文，作者文笔流畅，剧情应该是本书虫之前看过的两本小说的合订本改编，一本是家庭的，跟这个家庭的情况一模一样，一本是宗门的，设定也是一模一样"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771756907,"group_id":"7433546408050822206","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+WWFCkbdVtmLt+dxFVcHSvv9O1u86xAq+gOkYhBOTXM","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790605&x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"3584039088557405","user_name":"寡人老书虫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3584039088557405","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7433546408050822206","book_info":{"abstract":"【绝对爽文＋高武＋杀伐果断＋花式折磨和杀死欺辱原主的人】 
一睁眼，唐清墨穿越到平行世界。 
虽然是豪门少爷但开局就遭亲姐毒打！？ 
立即化身「农场主」，暴打及给她赠送一百抽，同时觉醒抽奖系统！ 
这才得知原主本是气运之子。孤儿出生、天赋异禀，获师傅和七个师姐倾心相待；十八岁被豪门认回，又有父母和七个姐姐宠爱无边。
然而天道被害，气运被夺，他的一切皆被师弟和假少爷夺走，成为被众人欺凌的万人嫌！最后被虐得心灰意冷，跟所有人绝断关系…然后欺负过他的人都后悔了？
唐清墨：神金病啊！ 
绝断关系？凭什么便宜他们？
系统：宿主，抽奖和拯救天道需要收集他们的悔意值！
唐清墨：那好办，把他们打到后悔也是悔啊！
系统：？
被那些所谓的家人和师门辱骂？冤枉？欺凌？ 
直接暴打上去！对他们实施花式羞辱和各种折磨！ 
把那些姐姐师姐弄至残废，精神失常，再折磨杀死！
主打就是以牙还牙，百倍奉还！
看到源源不绝的悔意值涌出，系统惊了！ 
唐清墨：我只是把一切回归爽文！ 
后悔？原谅？
地狱才是他们的归宿！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/08fba7d4d30328849bbcaa62b871f897","author":"老陈醋春卷","author_id":"","book_id":"7433546408050822206","book_name":"杀穿后悔文！开局我把亲人全祭天","book_short_name":"后悔流绝杀！","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7433762778524959294","read_count":"21232","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2048166"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"1010","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/18e9bd2e67dc2ed22e9808428fd143f4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779391271&x-signature=VF2Q4f9vHW0CY0wxE9gF71pl4Kc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3452886489775710","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"128"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230321113A2AC000FA1B04FCA81D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":52619,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":52627,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":890},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick
